markdownRemark.html:
Awesome Node-RED

Curated list of useful resources for Node-RED.

Node-RED is a programming tool for wiring together hardware devices, APIs and online services in new and interesting ways.

It provides a browser-based editor that makes it easy to wire together flows using the wide range of nodes in the palette that can be deployed to its runtime in a single-click.

Contents

  • Installation
  • Documentation
  • Nodes
    • Analysis
    • Database
    • Development
    • Function
    • Hardware
    • I/O
    • Image processing
    • Parsers
    • Smarthome
    • Social
    • System
    • Time
    • Utility
    • UI
  • Community

Installation

  • Running locally
  • Running under Dockerstars361
  • c't-Smart-Homestars154 - A ready-to-use setup for home automation maintained by german computer magazine c't.
  • Home Assistant Community Add-on - Starts an instance within Home Assistant and communicates with it.
  • ioBroker node-red Adapterstars48 - Starts an instance within ioBroker and communicates with it.
  • openHAB running on openHABian - Install Node-RED using openhab-config from command line, choose it from "Optional Components".
  • RedMatic - Install Node-RED on a CCU3, smart home automation hardware from the manufacturer eQ-3, popular especially in Germany.

Documentation

  • Getting Started
  • FAQ
  • Tutorials
  • User Guide

Nodes

Analysis

  • badwords - Analyses the payload and tries to filter out any messages containing bad swear words. This only operates on payloads of type string. Everything else is blocked.
  • wordpos - Analyses the payload and classifies the part-of-speech of each word. The resulting message has msg.pos added with the results. A word may appear in multiple categories (eg, 'great' is both a noun and an adjective).

Database

  • influxdbstars53 - Save and query data from an InfluxDB time series database.
  • mssql-plusstars18 - Execute queries, stored procedures and bulk inserts in Microsoft SQL Server and Azure Databases SQL2000 ~ SQL2019.
  • stackhero-influxdb-v2stars23 - Save and query data from an InfluxDB v2 time series database.
  • stackhero-mysqlstars9 - Connect to a MySQL or a MariaDB database, using TLS (SSL) and compatible with "Caching SHA2 password" authentication method (MySQL >= 8).
  • leveldb - Uses LevelDB for a simple key value pair database.
  • mysql - Allows basic access to a MySQL database.
  • sqlite - Supports read and write to a local sqlite database.

Development

  • typescript-starterstars60 - Quick-start template repository for creating new node sets in TypeScript.

Function

  • datagenerater - Generate dummy data in various formats, names, addresses, emails, numbers, words, etc.
  • pidcontrol - A PID control node for numeric inputs - provides simple controll loop feedback capability.
  • random - Random number generator - can generate integers for x to y - or floats between x and y.
  • rbe - Provide report by exception and deadband / bandgap capability for simple inputs.
  • smooth - Provide various functions across several previous values, including max, min, mean, high and low pass filters.

Hardware

  • arduino - Uses firmata protocol to talk to the board.
  • beaglebone - Nodes for the Beaglebone Black.
  • blink1 - Blink1 USB LED from ThingM.
  • blinkstick - BlinkStick USB LED device.
  • digirgb - DigiSpark RGB USB LED.
  • heatmiser - Temperature and frost protection for Heatmiser thermostats.
  • intel-galileo - A collection for the Intel Galileo and Edison.
  • ledborg - LEDborg plug on module.
  • makeymakey - Read from a MakeyMakey input device.
  • pi-gpiod - An alternative to the default PI GPIO nodes that allows remote access.
  • pi-mcp3008 - Read from MCP300x series Analogue to Digital Converter chips via the SPI bus.
  • pi-neopixel - Drive a strip of NeoPixels directly.
  • pi-unicorn-hat - Controls a Pimorini Unicorn HAT 8x8 LED display.
  • pibrella - Controls a Pibrella add-on board.
  • piface - PiFace interface module.
  • piliter - Controls a Pimorini Pi-LITEr 8 LED add-on board.
  • sensortag - Reads data from the Ti Bluetooth Low Energy SensorTag device.
  • wemo - Drive a WeMo socket and switch.
  • scanBLE - Scans for a particular Bluetooth Low Energy device.

I/O

  • discovery - Discovers other Avahi/Bonjour services on the network.
  • emoncms - Post to an Emoncms server.
  • noble-bluetoothstars5 - Based on noble for interaction with Bluetooth Low Energy devices.
  • mindconnectstars43 - Upload timeseries, files and events to MindSphere.
  • modbusstars218 - All in one Modbus TCP and Serial package.
  • mqlight - Adds nodes to send and receive using MQlight.
  • ping - Pings a machine and returns the trip time in mS.
  • s7stars77 - Interact with Siemens S7 PLCs.
  • serialport - Send messages to and receive messages from a physical serial port.
  • snmp - SNMP receivers for single OIDs or OID tables.
  • stomp - Publish and subscribe to and from a STOMP server.
  • wol - Sends a Wake-On-LAN magic packet to the mac address specified.
  • xiaomi-blestars20 - Single "Xiaomi BLE" node that gets all known data from Xiaomi BLE (Bluetooth 4).

Image processing

  • image-outputstars11 - Simple image output node. Useful for previewing images (of face detecting, object recognition etc.) inside the flow editor.
  • image-tools - Editing images, building and decoding 2D and 3D barcodes.

Parsers

  • base64 - Converts a payload to/from base64 encoded format.
  • buffer-parser - Converts values to and from buffer/array. Supports Big/Little Endian, BCD, byte swapping and much more.
  • geohash - Converts a lat, lon payload to/from geohash format.
  • msgpack - Converts a payload to/from msgpack binary packed format.
  • what3words - Encodes or Decodes a lat, lon position into what3words text format.

Smarthome

  • alexa-homestars31 - Connect with Alexa just wihtin the local network - no extra cloud stuff is required.
  • alexa-home-skill-v3stars11 - Controls things via Alexa and Google Home.
    • alexa-home-skill-v3-webstars44 - Web Service for Alexa and Google Home.
    • alexa-home-skill-v3-lambdastars9 - Lambda function for node-red-alexa-home-skill-v3-web.
  • alexa-remote2-applestrudelstars46 - Interacting with the Alexa API. Emulates routine behaviour, control and query your devices.
  • avr-yamahastars18 - Integrate and control YAMAHA™ audio/video receiver via YNCA protocol.
  • ccustars72 - Connect with Homematic, a series of smart home automation hardware from the manufacturer eQ-3, popular especially in Germany.
  • deconzstars82 - Access Zigbee 3.0 (Z30), Zigbee Home Automation (ZHA) and Zigbee Light Link (ZLL) lights via deCONZ.
  • fritzstars45 - Provides easy access to your AVM Fritz!Box. Read and write the configuration including the VoIP and Dect configuration.
  • fritzapistars15 - Controls smart home DECT devices and guest wifi through an AVM Fritz!Box.
  • harmonystars16 - Controls devices connected to a Logitech™ Harmony Hub.
  • home-assistantstars72 - Connect with Home Assistant.
  • home-assistant-websocketstars332 - Various nodes using websockets to assist in setting up communication with Home Assistant.
  • homebridge-automationstars92 - Integrate Homebridge Accessories into flows.
  • homeestars38 - Access the homee api and create virtual devices for homee.
  • homekit-bridgedstars319 - Imitate HomeKit devices.
  • huemagicstars190 - Controls Philips Hue bridges, lights, groups, scenes, rules, taps, switches, buttons, motion sensors, temperature sensors and Lux sensors.
  • lgtvstars53 - Controls LG webOS Smart TVs.
  • loxonestars63 - Connect to the Loxone Miniserver.
  • knx-ultimatestars104 - Controls KNX intallation. With optional ETS group address importer and gateway simulation.
  • openhab3stars11 - Integration of openHAB item states and commands.
  • power-saver - Automatically save money on variable electricity prices.
  • smartnorastars81 - Google smart home Action integration via Smart NORA.
  • sonos-plusstars57 - Controls Sonos player in your local network.
  • tado-clientstars15 - Connect to the Tado Web API.
  • tahomastars16 - Controls a Somfy Tahoma box (Roller shutters, etc.).
  • tasmotastars18 - Tasmota devices integration for building automation.
  • tuya-smartstars40 - Interface with smart plugs, bulbs, etc. from tuya.
  • zigbeestars81 - Controls Zigbee Devices via a CC253x Module.
  • zigbee2mqttstars70 - Zigbee2mqtt connectivity.
  • zwave-jsstars38 - Integrates Z-Wave node based on Z-Wave JS.

Social

  • chatbotstars817 - Full featured chat bot for Telegram, Facebook Messenger, Viber, Twilio and Slack.
  • discord-advancedstars27 - Interact with Discord, via Discord.js.
  • dweetio - Uses dweetio to send/receive messages.
  • email - Sends and receives simple emails from services like gmail or smtp or imap servers.
  • feedparser - Reads messages from an atom or rss feed.
  • irc - Connect to an IRC server to send and receive messages.
  • notify - Uses Growl to provide a desktop popup. Only useful on the local Apple machine.
  • prowl - Uses Prowl to push to an Apple device that has the Prowl app installed.
  • pushbullet - Uses PushBullet to push an Android device that has the app installed.
  • pusher - Publish-Subscribe to a Pusher channel/event.
  • pushover - Sends alerts via Pushover.
  • PushStaqstars0 - Send real time alerts using Push Notifications from your Node-Red flows to any device with PushStaq.
  • slackstars20 - Interact with the Slack API.
  • sms77stars0 - Uses sms77 service for SMS, text-to-speech calls and number lookups.
  • telegrambotstars207 - Contains a receiver and a sender node which act as a Telegram Bot.
  • twilio - Uses Twilio service to send/receive text messages.
  • whinstars11 - Send and receive whatsapps from within a nodered flow.
  • xmpp - Connect to an XMPP server to send and receive messages.
  • open-wa (whatsapp)stars11 - Efficiently connect to remote instances of your open-wa whatsapp automate servers.

System

  • aedesstars45 - MQTT Broker based on Aedes.
  • dockerodestars18 - Connect to Docker daemon.
  • osstars8 - Obtain system information.

Time

  • blindcontrollerstars21 - Automate the control of household roller blinds based on the current position of the sun.
  • bigtimerstars0 - Timing node with support for dusk/sunset dawn/sunrise and variations also day/week/month (and special days) control. The node offers outputs suitable for MQTT, speech and databases.
  • cron-plus - A flexible scheduler (cron, solar events, simple dates) node with full dynamic control and Timezone support.
  • suncalc - Uses the suncalc module to generate an output at sunrise and sunset based on a specified location.
  • simpletimestars3 - Adds time and date payloads with various formatting options, which can be retreived and used later in the flow.
  • sun-positionstars76 - Timer based flow control with dusk, dawn (and variations) and much more. Additional you can get sun and moon position or to control a flow by sun or moon position.
  • timeswitch - Lets the user set simple repeating timers for example for simple heating control, etc.

Utility

  • actionflowsstars38 - Brings easy to use loops and OOP (object oriented programming) features.
  • alarmstars20 - Build your own home alarm system with any number of panels, zones, sensors, triggers and automations.
  • bool-gate - Boolean logic gates.
  • daemon - Starts up (calls) a long running system program and pipes STDIN, STDOUT and STDERR to and from that process.
  • exif - Extracts GPS and other EXIF information from a passed in jpeg image.
  • german-holidaysstars11 - Getting german holidays or information if today/tomorrow is a holiday.
  • ical-eventsstars39 - Get events from an ical-URL, a caldav-server or from iCloud via kalender-eventsstars11.
  • interval-lengthstars4 - Measure the (time) interval length between successive messages.
  • momentstars32 - Produces a nicely formatted Date/Time string using the Moment.js library.
  • owntracksstars8 - Converts Owntrack Messages into standard geo message and deals with encrypted locations.
  • persiststars14 - Persist data over Node-RED restarts and deploys.
  • self-healingstars29 - Making Node-RED more resilient by adding self-healing capabilities.
  • state-machinestars15 - Wraps around the JavaScript State Machine to implement a finite state machine.
  • stringstars15 - Provides native and extended chainable JavaScript string parsing and manipulation methods.
  • twc-weatherstars8 - The Weather Company and Weather Underground Personal Weather Station APIs.
  • usersstars13 - Quickly build a very simple user access control for HTTP-based flows.
  • watsonstars79 - Interact with the IBM Watson services in IBM Cloud.

UI

  • browser-utilsstars16 - Add browser functionality such as file upload, camera & microphone.
  • node-red-dashboardstars1.1k - Create a live data dashboard.
    • https://flows.nodered.org/collection - Dashboard extra nodes.
    • ui-svg - Show interactive SVG (vector graphics) in the dashboard.
    • ui-contextmenu - Show a popup contextmenu in the dashboard.
  • flow-manager - Separates flow json to multiple files.
  • iglass - Interaction with iGlass Automation blocks.
  • uibuilderstars324 - Create dynamic web interfaces using any (or no) front end libraries for convenience.
  • web-worldmapstars83 - Provide a world map web page for plotting "things" on.

Community

  • HomeAssistant Forum
  • Node-RED Forum
  • Node-RED Blog
  • Node-RED User Group Japan
  • Reddit
  • Redmatic Forum
  • Slack
  • Stack Overflow
  • Steves Node-RED Guide
  • Twitter
  • YouTube

Contributing

Contributions welcome! Read the contribution guidelines first.
